overview: This deck leverages mana acceleration and devotion to green to cast large, efficient creatures ahead of the curve. Noble Hierarch provides consistent ramp and color fixing, while Green Sun's Zenith offers flexible card advantage and threat fetching. Frenzied Baloth anchors the strategy as a resilient pressure piece that enables further devotion plays.
win_conditions: Casting large devotion creatures ahead of the curve to overwhelm opponents
Using Green Sun's Zenith to fetch key threats or finishers
Applying sustained combat pressure with resilient creatures like Frenzied Baloth
Generating card advantage through Zenith searches to outlast midrange and control decks

keep_criteria: Hands containing Noble Hierarch or early mana acceleration
Hands with Green Sun's Zenith and a clear early target
Hands with two or more lands and a turn-one or turn-two play
mulligan_criteria: Hands lacking acceleration or early interaction
Hands with four or more lands
Hands missing black mana for key spells or removal

early_game: Play lands and prioritize casting Noble Hierarch on turn one
Use Green Sun's Zenith to fetch early threats or additional lands
Establish a mana base that supports both black and green spells
mid_game: Cast Frenzied Baloth and other devotion creatures to apply pressure
Use excess mana to cast multiple spells or fetch answers with Zenith
Trade efficiently with opponent's threats while preserving key permanents
late_game: Flood the board with large creatures to close out the game
Use Zenith to fetch game-ending threats or removal as needed
Leverage mana advantage to outpace opponent's resources and win with combat

key_cards.name: Green Sun's Zenith
key_cards.notes: Use to find lands when behind on mana or threats when ahead. Watch for opponent's removal or counterspells targeting the fetched creature.

key_cards.name: Noble Hierarch
key_cards.notes: Play on turn one if possible to enable early devotion creatures and Zenith. Use its mana abilities to smooth out your curve and cast larger spells.

key_cards.name: Frenzied Baloth
key_cards.notes: Use to pressure opponents while surviving targeted removal. Its presence enables casting larger devotion creatures and stabilizes the board.

sequencing_tips: Prioritize playing Noble Hierarch before casting Green Sun's Zenith to maximize mana efficiency
Hold up black mana for counterspells or removal when facing control or midrange decks
Use Zenith to fetch lands when behind on mana, and threats when ahead of the curve
Play Frenzied Baloth after establishing a base of devotion to maximize its board impact

matchups.advice: Prioritize early removal and Zenith fetches for blockers to stabilize the board
Play around counterspells by varying your Zenith targets and using Hierarch to outpace their curve
Race with resilient threats and use Hierarch to maintain mana advantage throughout the game
